provenance.notes: Migrated for 0.20.0 schema: advisor pass produced via the mandatory advisor agent path before provenance was a required field.

diffCoverage.notes: All three changed source files reviewed against the task contract scope. Evidence bundle gates (build/lint/tests/structural/smoke) are attested with verified hashes and a producible replay plan.

resolvedFindings.resolution: Session state lifted out of the command layer into the new session/ layer (SessionManager), as required by ADR-0003.
Per-account SendThrottle added on the send path; ban-risk r1 follow-up mitigated.
Unbounded Vec<Listener> replaced with per-account graceful shutdown via Listener::stop on replace/remove.

findings.evidence: Evidence bundle status=pass with five attested checks (rust.build, lint, tests, structural, smoke), all exitCode 0; task-evidence-check --strict --verify-hashes --replay-plan succeeds and the smoke sidecar prints only non-secret diagnostics (uid_len=19, msg_id_len=13). Four reviewer artifacts (advisor, security, architecture, reliability) are present and link from the bundle. The taskId/featureId match the active task contract.

The two_accounts_live test requires a second credential (ZALO_CRED_FILE_2) not available in this environment; the runnable session_manager_roundtrip_live smoke proves the full new mechanism (login → register → throttled send → manager-owned listener capture tagged with the correct account → graceful remove) on one live account. The concurrent-cardinality assertion (count==2) is covered by the offline tracks_multiple_accounts_concurrently test.
findings.fix: Run two_accounts_live once a second test account is provisioned to capture concurrent-login evidence; non-blocking.

summary: session-manager is honestly done. The missing session/ layer is added in its correct ADR-0003 position: SessionManager owns per-account API+Listener, gracefully stops listeners on replace/remove (closing the unbounded-Vec leak), and applies a per-account send throttle (mitigating ban-risk r1). The command layer delegates instead of holding session state, and zca-rust stays confined to zalo behind the MessageListener seam. Six offline tests plus an attested live round-trip prove lifecycle, throttle pacing, and per-account event tagging; build, clippy -D warnings, tests, and structural all pass with verified hashes. Pass.
